creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As David Muir Sharnoff wrote:

> 	FreeBSD 2.1-stable as of about 2.1.5
> 	Fresh -stable sources

2.1-stable is no longer maintained.

> >Fix:
> 
> I only spent about 10 minutes making the patch so somebody might
> be able to do a better job of it.

The sources in -current have been fixed by rev 1.7.

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
